title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision capabilities, without maps or game-state helpers. Earlier Claude models required a complex helper harness for the same task.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision, with no maps or game-state helpers. It matters as an agent-evaluation milestone: earlier Claude models needed a complex helper harness to finish the same task, so removing that scaffolding isolates the model's own multimodal perception and decision-making. The key takeaway is that vision and reasoning alone now carry the full loop from screen to action across a long-horizon game.
